mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns show no statistical significance (p > 0.10) during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0 percent, labor market slack suppresses corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 9.0 percent, or the signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) in post-2009 data.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to outperform baseline returns (Sharpe ratio < 0.5) over any 2-year forward window, or GDPC1 and RSAFS diverge without affecting equity returns.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp month-over-month contractions in the industrial production index signal immediate supply chain bottlenecks and inventory drawdowns, triggering negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in over 60 percent of months where INDPRO declines by more than 0.5 percent, or the signal shows zero autocorrelation with market moves.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer price index levels combined with a flat federal funds rate indicate unanchored inflation expectations, forcing equity repricing and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL rises above 0.3 percent monthly while rates are unchanged, or the interaction term yields a negative Rank IC over rolling 18-month windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls increases household income and corporate profit margins, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.015 across all 3-year rolling windows, or payroll growth fails to correlate with equity returns (correlation coefficient < 0.05) in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: When new housing starts fall below 550 thousand units, construction sector weakness cascades into broader consumer confidence declines, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 50 percent of months where HOUST drops below 550 thousand, or the threshold signal shows no statistical edge (p > 0.05) in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising industrial production and falling unemployment indicates labor hoarding during early recovery, creating short-term valuation compression and negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The divergence signal produces positive 5-day returns in over 65 percent of occurrences, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shifts.
